auth-service/src/main/java/com/example/a.general_idea: Remove an unused import statement to clean up the code.
Increase the TTL for verified status to give users more time to reset their password.
auth-service/src/main/java/com/example/a.human_impl: private static final Duration VERIFIED_TTL = Duration.ofMinutes(15);

auth-service/src/main/java/com/example/a.general_idea: Trim whitespace from the OTP input to prevent validation issues due to accidental spaces.
auth-service/src/main/java/com/example/a.human_impl: final String otp = request.getOtp() != null ? request.getOtp().trim() : null;

auth-service/src/main/java/com/example/a.general_idea: Add debug and info logs to trace the password reset flow and OTP verification status.
Add warning logs when password reset is not allowed to aid in debugging access issues.
auth-service/src/main/java/com/example/a.human_impl: log.warn("resetPassword - Not allowed. Email: {}, Has OTP: {}", ...);

auth-service/src/main/java/com/example/a.general_idea: Add info and error logs to track the success or failure of the password update operation.
auth-service/src/main/java/com/example/a.human_impl: log.info("resetPassword - Password updated successfully..."); log.error("resetPassword - Failed to update password...");

file-storage/src/main/java/com/example/f.general_idea: Added import for java.util.List to support the new endpoint's return type.
Introduced a new REST endpoint to handle multiple file uploads simultaneously.
Add a new method to the FileService interface to support uploading multiple images at once.

gateway/src/main/java/com/example/gatewa.general_idea: Added new authentication endpoints to the whitelist to bypass JWT validation.
gateway/src/main/java/com/example/gatewa.human_impl: Added "/v1/auth/verifyOtp" and "/v1/auth/updatePassword" to the list of excluded paths.

notification-service/src/main/java/com/e.general_idea: Configure Kafka consumer to use all DNS IPs to resolve bootstrap servers correctly in containerized environments.

order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Import the ShopOwnerDto class to support the new endpoint return type.
Add a new Feign client method to retrieve shop owner details by user ID.
Inject ShippingOrderRepository to enable fetching shipping details for orders.
Inject GhnApiClient to enable integration with the shipping provider API.
Add Lombok @Slf4j annotation to enable structured logging in the controller.
Fetch and attach shipping fee from the database to the OrderDto during enrichment.
Add a new endpoint to cancel an order with an optional reason.
Add a new endpoint to calculate shipping fees using the GHN API based on address and weight.
Add Lombok @Builder, @NoArgsConstructor, and @AllArgsConstructor annotations to enable builder pattern and constructor generation.
Add an 'id' field to the DTO to support unique identification of address records.
Add fields for GHN (Giao Hang Nhanh) integration including provinceId, districtId, wardCode, and their corresponding names.
order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: private Integer provinceId; private String provinceName; private Integer districtId; private String districtName; private String wardCode; private String wardName;

order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Add latitude and longitude fields to support geolocation data.
order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: private Double latitude; private Double longitude;

order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Mark existing province, district, and city fields as deprecated to encourage migration to new GHN fields while maintaining backward compatibility.
order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: @Deprecated private String province; @Deprecated private String district; @Deprecated private String city;

order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Add a helper method to construct a full address string from component fields for frontend or response usage.
Add a new field to the DTO to store shipping fee information from GHN.
order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.human_impl: private Double shippingFee; // Phí ship từ GHN

order-service/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Add the RETURNED status to the OrderStatus enum to support order return workflows.
Add the COMPLETED status to the OrderStatus enum to distinguish final successful orders from delivered ones.
Add @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING) to the orderStatus field to ensure the enum is persisted as a string rather than an ordinal.
